title: Mad Science
description: Deal 12 damage. Additional effects depend on the TinkerTime rider applied to this card.
notes: Mad Science is part of the TinkerTime event mechanic. This card can manifest as an Attack (dealing 12 damage), Skill (gaining 8 Block), or Power form based on TinkerTime configuration. Additionally applies a rider effect: Sapping (apply 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable to target), Choking (enemy loses 6 HP whenever you play a card), Energized (gain 2 Energy), Wisdom (draw 3 cards), Chaos (add random free card to hand), Expertise (gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity), Curious (Powers cost 1 Energy less), or Improvement (upgrade random card at end of combat). Upgrade adds Innate keyword. Target type varies based on card form: Single (Attack form) or Self (Skill/Power forms).
